case_title: PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC VS. ASHLEA BRUCE ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DAVID WASSERMAN RE COPY OF LEASE AGREEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 69685741) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BRUCE, ASHLEA

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT BRUCE, ASHLEA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (RENT DUE AFTER 3/31/2022) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT BRUCE, ASHLEA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 69685741) AS TO DEFENDANT BRUCE, ASHLEA

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 69685741), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY SERVED MAR-04-2023, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 69685741), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY SERVED MAR-04-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE MAR-06-2023 AS TO DEFENDANT BRUCE, ASHLEA
DECLARATION OF DAVID P. WASSERMAN, ESQ. IN SUPPORT OF WRIT OF POSSESSION / $94.14 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRUCE, ASHLEA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 15 CASTELO AVENUE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94132, LEASE FORFEITED, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 69685741)
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT BRUCE, ASHLEA
VERIFICATION BY LANDLORD REGARDING RENTAL ASSISTANCE UNLAWFUL DETAINER (TRANSACTION ID # 69685741) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
